extract: Bullet Seed (Japanese: タネマシンガン Seed Machine Gun) is a damage-dealing Grass-type multistrike move introduced in Generation III. It is: TM09 from Generation III to Generation IV, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM50 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM056 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM040 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A
